title: Dog discovers 10,000-year-old walrus fossil at Jersey Shore
description: The Edelman Fossil Park & Museum in Gloucester County received a fossil of a walrus femur that was found by a man walking his dog on the beach in Bay Head, Ocean County in January. The fossil dates back 10,000 years or more.

title: As CO2 rose in a warm ancient climate, study shows El Niño peaked then weakened - Phys.org
description: As CO2 rose in a warm ancient climate, study shows El Niño peaked then weakened Phys.org

title: Reading fossil skull fracture patterns: Biomechanical analysis provides new insights
description: A research team associated with the European project DEATHREVOL has published a study in the journal Scientific Reports that proposes new analytical tools to better understand how fractures of the human skull occur and how these injuries can be interpreted in order to distinguish between accidental trauma and trauma resulting from interpersonal violence. The study involved researchers from Centro Nacional de Investigación sobre Evolución Humana (CENIEH) and from the University of Burgos and Rey Juan Carlos University (Madrid).

description: The Allure of Rich Wilde’s Quest The Book of Dead game has captivated players with its classic high-volatility theme, transporting them to the ancient world of Egypt in search of hidden treasures.
